programme.desc: The gang is devastated after their tree house collapses. It was the best place to hang out in the whole world. Can an architect get them to agree on a new design? Everyone in Arthur's chorus group is excited about their upcoming performance in Crown City.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: Just the Right Distance From the Sun/ Solar Power Rover
programme.desc: Sean explains that Earth is a 'Goldilocks' planet because it's not too hot and not too cold.

programme.title: Nature Cat: Plants Got the Moves/ Magnet Mania
programme.desc: Daisy prepares for The Animal Science Fair, held in the woods. Ole' Lucky the Lodestone, one of the world's largest magnetic rocks, makes an appearance.

programme.title: Splash and Bubbles: The Job Search/ Reeftown's Got Talent!
programme.desc: Splash, Bubbles and their best friends Dunk and Ripple go on epic adventures.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Cabbagezilla/ Name Game
programme.desc: Trini’s excited to enter Big Green, her giant cabbage, into the Alaska State Fair, but a suspicious moose keeps nibbling its leaves. Molly wants to get her Native name when she discovers that her Mom, Dad, Grandpa and others in the community have one.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Johann Sebastian Bach/ I Am Marie Curie
programme.desc: Xavier goes back in time to meet Johann Sebastian Bach and practice for the school talent show.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: Speaking Wigglewalker/ London Frog
programme.desc: In London, Andy and friends are sent on an important shopping trip for the Circo, but the simple task becomes confusing due to differences between British and American English.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The T-Ball Problem/ The Bus Problem
programme.desc: Peg’s T-Ball Team, the Mighty Nine, have no chance against a team of Aliens all-stars -- Unless Peg can use the Aliens’ T-ball cards to predict where they’ll hit.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Daniel's Very Different Day/ Class Trip to the Library
programme.desc: Daniel was expecting to have a special picnic at Katerina's house, but the day doesn't turn out quite as he had planned.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Fixing X
programme.desc: Big Bird and Snuffy are the hosts of "The Letter of the Day Show" on Sesame Street and learn all about how the letter "X" can come at the end of a word.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Invisible Band/ Best Pink Present
programme.desc: The Pinkville marching band comes down with a bad case of the whiffling sneezes and can't play, disappointing the town.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Patisserie
programme.desc: Join the four remaining bakers in the semi-final as they bash and fold pastry to achieve perfect lamination; make yeast cake with a fruity top and delicate chocolate work; and prepare a multiple mini-cake bake.

programme.title: Nature: The Whale Detective
programme.desc: A filmmaker investigates his traumatic encounter with a 30-ton humpback whale that breached and almost landed on him while he was kayaking. What he discovers raises far bigger questions about humans' relationship with whales and their future.

programme.title: Nova: Inner Worlds
programme.desc: 'Nova' explores the awesome beauty of the planets of our solar system. In this episode, we look at the rocky planets; Mercury, Venus, Earth and Mars. All were born of similar material around the same time, but only one supports life.

programme.title: Ozone Hole: How We Saved the Planet
programme.desc: The unsettling discovery that chemical gasses (CFCs) possibly damaged the ozone layer turned the world upside down in the 1980s. Without the ozone layer, our planet would have no protection against the sun.

programme.title: NCIS: Check

programme.title: NCIS: The Enemy Within

programme.title: NCIS: We Build, We Fight

programme.title: NCIS: Cadence
programme.desc: DiNozzo returns to the military academy he attended as a teenager after a murdered marine and alumnus of the school is found clutching a photo of a current student. Also, Bishop and her husband invite Gibbs and the team out for a special dinner.

programme.desc: Lucy takes a job and gets more than she bargained for, ending up in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Plays Cupid
programme.desc: Lucy tries to arrange a match between a love-starved older lady and a giddy grocery man.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Fakes Illness
programme.desc: If Ricky keeps refusing to hire Lucy, she fears she will have to have a nervous breakdown.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: An FBI agent investigates the girls' lives for a possible visit from President Bush. This leads the girls to reminisce about times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: When the FBI agent announces that George Bush will make a visit to their home, the girls continue to reminisce and Dorothy quickly readies a list of points she wants to make to the president.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche Delivers
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter wants to give birth in a birthing center while Blanche is preoccupied by the possibility of Rebecca delivering in a local hospital. Blanche doesn't want to be embarrassed by the fact that her daughter was artificially inseminated.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Once in St. Olaf
programme.desc: Rose makes a stunning discovery while admitting a patient at the hospital. Meanwhile, Sophia has to have surgery, but a mix-up occurs after the operation and Sophia becomes lost in the hospital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: If at Last You Do Succeed
programme.desc: Stan has finally hit it big with a new invention, but still Dorothy can't be happy for him. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche fight over some war bonds that, if cashed, could bankrupt St. Olaf.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Snap Out of It
programme.desc: Blanche is dreading her birthday and Dorothy helps Sophia with 'Meals on Wheels.'

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Registered dietitian Annessa Chumbley prepares a hearty tomato soup. Food and lifestyle expert Chadwick Boyd visits.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: 'Very Cavallari' star Kristin Cavallari stops by. Actress Carly Hughes talks about 'American Housewife.'

programme.title: Movie: Cooking With Love
programme.desc: Fun with a side of love ensues as a television producer and a cook are paired on a children's cooking show.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The antics of pre-pubescent school children Kyle, Cartman, Kenny and Stan, as they stumble through the deranged misadventures of their hometown, South Park.

programme.title: South Park: I'm a Little Bit Country
programme.desc: The boys join some anti-war protesters because it's a free pass out of school for the day. Meanwhile, it's the right vs. the left when the town is split between different opinions on war.

programme.title: South Park: World War Zimmerman
programme.desc: Cartman sees Token as a threat to all humanity.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: South Park: Ass Burgers
programme.desc: Cartman must find a way to deal with his Asperger's Syndrome.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Incredible Gift
programme.desc: After sustaining a severe head injury, Cartman appears to have the power to see into the future. South Park detectives are quick to enlist his help in cracking unsolved murder cases.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Christian Rock Hard
programme.desc: When the other boys kick Cartman out of their band, he pulls his own group together to make music for Jesus.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Finds Love
programme.desc: Cartman finally lets a special someone knows exactly how he feels about them.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime 2000
programme.desc: Cartman is pursued by the FBI for committing a hate crime against Token and lands in juvenile hall.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go
programme.desc: Things go horribly wrong when Cartman plans to propel himself into the future. South Park Elementary School is facing strong opposition to the topic of evolution being taught to the fourth graders, especially from Mr. Garrison who must teach it.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII
programme.desc: After freezing himself in an attempt to make his three-week wait for a Nintendo Wii pass quickly, Cartman lands himself over 500 years in the future. Stuck in a tumultuous place with warring factions and angry sea otters, Cartman fights to return home.

programme.title: South Park: Tsst!
programme.desc: Cartman's mom gets help from an expert when she realizes she cannot control her son anymore. The expert, known as 'The Dog Whisperer', may have what it takes but Eric Cartman's not going down without a fight.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: January 8, 2020
programme.desc: Mo Rocca, correspondent for 'CBS Sunday Morning' visits.

programme.title: Lights Out With David Spade: Justin Martindale, Erik Griffin and Morgan Stewart
programme.desc: Panelists Justin Martindale, Erik Griffin and Morgan Stewart join David Spade to talk about the latest in pop culture.

programme.title: South Park: Butterballs
programme.desc: Butters is the victim of an unlikely bully.

programme.title: South Park: Taming Strange
programme.desc: Kyle's brother Ike is finally growing up leading to them to lose touch. To keep things from drifting apart, Kyle takes Ike to a Yo Gabba Gabba show.

programme.title: South Park: The Coon
programme.desc: 'The Coon' rises from the trash and takes his place as a lone vigilante who wipes out crime in the town of South Park. When another superhero encroaches on his territory, The Coon seeks out some unlikely allies.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah
programme.desc: A reality-based look at news, trends, pop culture, current events and politics with Trevor Noah.

programme.title: South Park: The Entity
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device. Meanwhile, Kyle tries to ditch his cousin, also named Kyle, who comes to South Park for an extended visit.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek vs. Craig
programme.desc: The boys instigate a fight between Tweek and Craig in shop class. Meanwhile, Mr. Adler, the shop teacher, is haunted by a recurring dream of his lost love.

programme.title: South Park: Simpsons Already Did It
programme.desc: Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by 'The Simpsons.' Meanwhile, Cartman and the boys try to retrieve their sea-men from Ms. Choksondik's stomach.

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: When Kenny meets with an unfortunate accident, Cartman lobbies to let Kenny die so he can get what Kenny left to him in Kenny's will. Meanwhile, Kenny is called upon to fight against the forces of Satan in heaven using his PSP skills.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Camp
programme.desc: Cartman's family and friends stage an intervention, and force him to trim down. While Cartman's away, Kenny's star is on the rise when he gets his own reality TV show.

programme.title: South Park: AWESOM-O
programme.desc: Cartman plans to learn all of Butters' innermost secrets and then use them against him, by pretending to be Butters' new best friend, a robot named AWESOM-O.

programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: The Killer Twins
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo tries to find answers to the age-old question of nature versus nurture, asking if the desire to kill could be a genetic trait.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bears of a Feather
programme.desc: When a hungry bear breaks into Noah's tent and spooks the livestock, the Browns suspect it is being attracted by the ranch's newest arrivals, three young ostriches. Later, the windmill assembly takes the siblings to dangerous new heights.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Storm's Fury
programme.desc: The first major storm of the season threatens the family's progress. With a big bush wedding coming in days, the Browns race to obtain and haul much needed water tanks before the full force of the storm hits.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Off the Grid: A Very Bush Wedding
programme.desc: Loaded with exclusive new footage from the Bush: The wolfpack prepares for their first wedding in the bush. Emotions run high as the family prepares to welcome a new member, and the Browns struggle to keep a project on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bam Bam's Big Build and Bears
programme.desc: A hungry predator encroaches deeper onto North Star Ranch forcing Bird and Gabe to take stronger action. Bam must play nice with his siblings in an effort to finally break ground on his homestead. Gabe has an incredible surprise for the Wolf Pack.

programme.desc: Bart the Bear faces the mightiest human yet in national arm-wrestling champion Bruce. Honey Bump schools Jersey girl Christina when it comes to running anything but her mouth. MMA fighter Jesse fights for a chance at a cage match with a grizzly.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Family First
programme.desc: Barn construction is all hands-on deck, but the family confronts Bam when he chooses to pay more attention to his own projects.

programme.desc: The Browns move into their new home and look toward the future. After living in the same house as the family for 32 years, Matt creates his own one-of-a-kind tire house. Ami enlists the help of an Alaskan matchmaker to find mates for her five grown boys.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bam Bam's Big Build and Bears

programme.title: Epic Bar Builds: Speakeasy and Whiskey a-Go-Go Bar
programme.desc: The Heineman Bar Company travels back in time to revive the speakeasy in the Mile High city and revitalize a stagnant business in the heart of Philadelphia.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ohio Valley Hut
programme.desc: Two brothers build a high-end, off-grid vacation home on their Ohio family's cattle ranch.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Volcano Home
programme.desc: A couple builds a rainforest retreat within the edge of an active volcano on Hawaii's Big Island.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Lake Superior Lodge
programme.desc: A couple races to finish a modern, off-grid lodge overlooking the south shores of Lake Superior.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Crest
programme.desc: Builder Phil Parr heads to the wilderness of northern Colorado to build the ultimate off-grid tent. Far beyond simple nylon and poles, this lavish tent has a custom fabricated wooden frame, canvas shell and 650-square-feet of livable elegance.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Drowning
programme.desc: The Raneys must save two Hawaiian homesteaders who built their dream homestead in the path of life-threatening flash floods. As the weather closes in, the Raneys must battle to save a homestead from drowning and also win the trust of the homesteaders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Methane Meltdown
programme.desc: The Raneys have a challenge on their hands as they try to restore a couple's failed homestead in Ohio. Marty's only hope is an old gas well, which if he can get working, can breathe life back into the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trapped
programme.desc: An isolated road becomes a death trap when a medical emergency strikes a secluded homestead. The Raneys face their first ever failed rescue.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Homestead of Horrors
programme.desc: A nightmare in North Carolina. A couple that is terrified to hunt and a ramshackle home with exposed wires in the shower and chickens in the living room. The Raneys have never seen a homestead like this.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Ashley R.'s Story
programme.desc: At 670 pounds Ashley must live in her parents' home with her husband. Desperate to save her life and her marriage, she decides it's time for a drastic change.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: John and Lonnie's Story
programme.desc: John and Lonnie are two brothers from opposite ends of the spectrum. For years estranged, the brothers are now brought together by a common need to lose weight while they still can.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Lindsey's Story
programme.desc: Lindsey Witte had it all: a white picket fence, a loving husband, a great job. Now her food addiction is threatening to ruin everything and embarks on a weight loss journey to save her life.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: 1,000 Pounds to Freedom
programme.desc: Amy and Tammy go to Atlanta to meet Dr. Procter to discuss weight loss surgery. When they arrive, Dr. Procter gives Tammy a hefty weight loss goal before he will approve her for surgery, meanwhile the Dietician has more bad news for Amy.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Somewhere in There Is a Foot
programme.desc: Stacy's life-threatening scar on her foot has left her hopeless, but she's giving it one last shot. David has the worst case of foot fungus Dr. Schaeffer has seen, and Morgan, an erotic paranormal romance novelist, is hoping to her sixth toe amputated.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby

programme.title: I Was Prey: Mauled in the Mountains

programme.title: I Was Prey: Silent Scream

programme.title: I Was Prey: Unseen Assailant
programme.desc: Paul is leading a canoe safari near Victoria Falls when a hippo bursts to the surface and drags him into the water. In Texas, five-year-old Jade DeMoss is outside, looking for her mother, when an animal pounces on her and attacks.

programme.desc: We're recounting the greatest moments from all the furry-ious years of puppies at play.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Under Attack: Brink of Death
programme.desc: A lurking rattlesnake attacks a man tending to his garden and a hungry bull shark mistakes an avid fisherman as lunch. Later, on a river tour a couple comes face-to-face with a crocodile, while a man encounters a grizzly bear.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Deadly Decision
programme.desc: Sandy Prince is swimming in an African river when she's attacked by a massive crocodile. While mountain-biking in Washington State, Phil Anderson comes face to face with a hungry cougar.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Feeding Frenzy
programme.desc: Andrea Schlake is volunteering at an animal sanctuary when a chimpanzee escapes its enclosure and chases her down. Surfer Todd Endris is ready to catch a wave when a great white shark knocks him off his board and attacks him.

programme.desc: Andrea Schlake is volunteering at an animal sanctuary when a chimpanzee escapes its enclosure and chases her down. Surfer Todd Endris is ready to catch a wave when a great white shark knocks him off his board and attacks him.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Backyard Bite
programme.desc: Outside Corpus Christi, Texas, Jeremy Sutcliffe is working in his garden when a rattlesnake bite puts him on the brink of death. While spearfishing in the Bahamas, Kent Bonde is blindsided by a bull shark that tears the calf muscle from his leg.

programme.title: Mystery of the Lost Islands: Killer Whale Island
programme.desc: Dave travels to a remote speck of land in the wild and stormy South Atlantic, which is visited by a huge number of hunting killer whales.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Big Croc Diaries: Special Edition
programme.desc: Steve introduces his favourite crocodiles at Australia Zoo.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Jungle Kitties and Baby Skunks

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: My Boyfriend vs. My Cat
programme.desc: Adrianne Curry and her boyfriend, Todd live with a menacing Siamese cat. Then, a college student is held prisoner by her bloodthirsty cat.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Never Give Up
programme.desc: In Mexico, Dr. Jeff treats a dog with a painful looking growth and Drs. Petra and Nichols help a dog seriously injured in a fight. The team also tries to catch and treat a pack of feral dogs.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Emergency Engine Cat
programme.desc: Dr. Ross and vet tech Kyerra rush into action to save a stray cat that's been brutally mangled by a car engine. The Ross' move into their new home while Dr. Blue treats a 700lb arthritic pig. Dr. Lavigne sees a rescue Chihuahua with an incredible story.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Irwin African Adventure
programme.desc: Following Steve's dream of global conservation, the Irwins travel to South Africa. Terri helps release a wild leopard, Bindi learns from the all-female anti-poaching squad The Black Mambas, and Robert attempts to photograph Africa's 'Big Five.'

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Young giraffe mum Tula gives birth, while both the penguin chicks and a silvery gibbon baby must face their fears as they grow up.

programme.title: The Zoo: Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: The future of the American bison depends on a high-stakes race across the country. The reptile staff have their hands full with a diamond rattlesnake that needs to be medicated orally. A pair of cheetahs is trained to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Down Below

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: The Snowball Effect

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Coast Stories

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Loss Angeles
programme.desc: Ryan nervously premieres a music video for his Tribeca loft, but worries that his dancing skills might not be in step with buyers' expectations.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Ruffled Heathers

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Co-List or No-List

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Biggest Cruise Ship

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Toughest Tunnels

programme.title: The Explosion Show: FBI Bomb Squad

programme.title: The Explosion Show: When Mountains Explode
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts using cutting-edge explosives to turn entire mountains into gravel-sized bits essential for construction, and their investigation reveals the high-powered, hi-tech process behind this dangerous work.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Tesla Conspiracy

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Alien Stonehenge
programme.desc: An alien Stonehenge with a sinister purpose, an eerie building filled with strange labyrinths, and an endless concrete track in the middle of nowhere are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Ice Fortress

programme.desc: Family bonds and family struggles take center stage when a man approaches Robb and Bethany and asks them to help find his missing daughter whom he fears is dead. The ROC squad set up a high-profile sting to capture a group of thieves preying on Tampa.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: A woman drives with 60 pounds of dope in her car trunk while her daughter sleeps in the backseat.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The Candyman
programme.desc: A series of controlled buys leads detectives to the house of a local dealer.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: With a large shipment of heroin about to arrive in Laredo, the LPD team conducts a citywide crackdown of suspected heroin dealers to learn where and when the drugs will arrive.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Third Time's a Charm
programme.desc: Detectives are determined to take down Quack, one of Laredo's most notorious heroin dealers.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Fifty Tons
programme.desc: A local casino's connection to a prostitution ring may give detectives the chance to hurt the cartels.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The Ledger
programme.desc: LPD Narcotics busts a stash house holding cocaine and guns, plus a ledger filled with information that could help end a heavy cocaine operation.

programme.title: Crime 360: Deadly Rendezvous
programme.desc: The body of a 34 year-old male, shot to death behind an abandoned building, was found by the detectives who now seek his killer.

programme.title: American Monster: Don't Forget Me
programme.desc: On the day before he's to start a new job, a father-of-two disappears with no warning. His wife has no idea where he went. His friends hint that he led a secret, sordid life. But it remains a mystery for years - until a tip reveals the jaw-dropping truth.

programme.title: American Monster: Remote Control
programme.desc: When Sherri Dally mysteriously vanishes from her Ventura home, her husband Michael and best friend Debbie head up a massive search. But someone knows more than they're saying. Never-before-aired home videos trace a tale of sordid secrets and double lives.

programme.title: American Monster: Two Families
programme.desc: April and Michael Holton live a perfect life, until a shocking murder exposes a dark secret.

programme.title: American Monster: Two Families
programme.desc: April and Michael Holton live a perfect life, until a shocking murder exposes a dark secret.

programme.title: Killer Bods: Pride and Payback
programme.desc: Competition among personal trainers at a high-end Florida gym is intense. A new general manager comes aboard to steady the ship, but tension lies just beneath the surface. A volatile mix of pride and rage ignites a horrific and deadly chain reaction.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Blood Relative
programme.desc: After a father is found shot in front of his home, Kenda uncovers a vengeful motive behind a deadly family feud. Then, a church of God turns into a house of horrors as officers face a life-or-death decision when confronted by a knife-wielding psychopath.

programme.title: She Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: Mitra Mehrabadi and her family came from Iran to live the American dream. After landing the perfect job at an insurance agency in downtown Portland, she finds herself the object of desire for several men around the office, and soon, the victim of murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A soldier is stabbed to death at a drive-thru. Kenda's only clue is that this is somehow tied to a breakdancing competition. Then a 29-year-old man moves back to Colorado Springs, but at his welcome home party he winds up shot execution-style.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Blood Relative
programme.desc: After a father is found shot in front of his home, Kenda uncovers a vengeful motive behind a deadly family feud. Then, a church of God turns into a house of horrors as officers face a life-or-death decision when confronted by a knife-wielding psychopath.

programme.title: She Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: Mitra Mehrabadi and her family came from Iran to live the American dream. After landing the perfect job at an insurance agency in downtown Portland, she finds herself the object of desire for several men around the office, and soon, the victim of murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A soldier is stabbed to death at a drive-thru. Kenda's only clue is that this is somehow tied to a breakdancing competition. Then a 29-year-old man moves back to Colorado Springs, but at his welcome home party he winds up shot execution-style.

programme.title: Killer Bods: Pride and Payback
programme.desc: Competition among personal trainers at a high-end Florida gym is intense. A new general manager comes aboard to steady the ship, but tension lies just beneath the surface. A volatile mix of pride and rage ignites a horrific and deadly chain reaction.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Dying Plea
programme.desc: 16 years after Jerome Scott was found stabbed to death in his home, police moved in on his ex-wife, Patricia Wright, claiming she killed him out of rage for money. Now, her sister and daughter are on a crusade to prove the wrong person is behind bars.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Failure to Remember
programme.desc: Penny Brummer, a military vet, is accused of murdering her ex-girlfriend's best friend in a jealous rage. However, Penny was so drunk that night she was in a blackout state. Can Chris and Melissa help fill in the gaps of her memory to prove her innocence?

programme.title: Murder Calls: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: A young father calls 911, gasping that he accidentally shot himself while working on a farm. Police race to find him and keep him on the line. They hear a second shot--a shot that reveals an astonishing twist: this shooting was no accident.

programme.title: Murder Calls: The Dark Horse
programme.desc: A woman returns home to find her husband unconscious and bleeding on the floor of their horse barn. A 911 operator coaches her through CPR, but it's too late. Finding clues in the call itself, police unearth a sick plot to kill a beloved father.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Torched Heart
programme.desc: A frantic woman calls 911 saying an intruder just entered her home and shot her husband. When the victim, a local fire chief, dies from his injuries, the first responder community works tirelessly to find out who killed one of their own.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed Fabio?
programme.desc: Fabio Sementilli was a beloved hairstylist and beauty executive who was murdered while relaxing near his pool. Michelle Miller investigates his murder and the hunt for his killers.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: A Colorado man loses two wives in freak accidents but family members don't believe his story.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death After Midnight
programme.desc: A married mother of three was found with a single gunshot wound to her head. Unknown was how she was shot, if it was suicide or murder. The coroner ruled it a suicide but a call from a source re-opened the case with the husband arrested.

programme.title: Homicide City: Bingham Street Blues
programme.desc: Northeast Philadelphia's Crescentville neighborhood is known for tranquility seldom seen in major cities. But when a mother, her boyfriend, and daughter are found slain at home, the community searches for answers.

programme.title: Homicide City: Germantown Tragedy
programme.desc: When Asia Adams' body is discovered after a fire in her home, police are unsure if her death was an accident or arson. But when the investigation reveals the truly horrific nature of her murder, police find themselves pursuing an elusive killer.

programme.title: Homicide City: Main Line Massacre
programme.desc: When Philadelphia Mainliners Courtlandt and Alexandra Gross are found murdered in their home, detectives begin the hunt for a calculated killer which takes them from one of the wealthiest zip codes in the country straight into the heart of Philly.

programme.title: Homicide City: High Rise Murder
programme.desc: When Helen Bernstein is found dead in the bathtub of her Chestnut Hill high-rise, she appears to have died of natural causes.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun
programme.desc: 1644. Ng Mui escapes from Beijing. Taking refuge in a Shaolin monastery, she learns their Kung Fu and develops a new form of the martial art.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Rome's Navy Seals
programme.desc: They are the amphibious Roman unit tasked with the impossible. Called Batavians, they led the invasion of ancient Britain in AD43. Discover the story behind a desperate mission deep in enemy territory that may hand the emperor an unlikely victory.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Vlad's Impalers
programme.desc: Vlad the Impaler, the inspiration for the fictional character of Dracula, was one of the most ruthless and brutal rulers in medieval Europe.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Viking Apocalypse
programme.desc: Backed with overwhelming force, Pagan Vikings wrestle King Alfred for control of 9th century England.

programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.desc: Pressure from African-American activist groups pushed President Roosevelt to initiate a Blacks-only fighter pilot training program during WWII.

programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Big Lift
programme.desc: Mike and his team get the rafters and roofing underway but with no lack of challenges. Dave and Hans are on their own with setting the extremely heavy ridge beam until help arrives. Adam successfully transports all of his logs to his build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Lost in Logs
programme.desc: Dave and Hans have two 700-hundred pound ridgepoles to set. Running out of weatherproofing Mike is forced to forge ahead in dodgy weather. For builder Adam, a faster pace comes to a screeching halt when two crucial logs go missing.

programme.desc: A beautiful century-old Craftsman house has been lovingly updated by the homeowners, but the boxy kitchen with counter space spread out into two rooms has the couple at a standstill until licensed contractor James steps in.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Treasure Hunting
programme.desc: Rob and his right-hand man, Wes, are on a treasure hunt for their next project in Palm Beach, Florida. They check out four properties, but they all need a ton of work. After a scary situation leaves them spooked, the choice is clear.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Shell Shocked
programme.desc: After surveying the property and running the numbers, Rob determines they have to start from scratch. It becomes a race against time as he and the crew only have 90 days to demo and rebuild the shell.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Pool Problems
programme.desc: At Rob's latest project, the current state of the pool spells disaster. It's small and square, not to mention filthy, so Rob designs a whole new look for this outdated eyesore to make it pool party-worthy.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Icing on the Kitchen
programme.desc: The current kitchen at Rob's project in Palm Beach lacks the space and grace that Rob is looking for. He and the ninjas come up with a plan to give the heart of the home a full face lift with plenty of bling.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: The Backyard Bling Out
programme.desc: This home's big backyard is a huge selling point but there's a lot of wasted space. Rob and the ninjas get down to business installing a landing pad, a luxury hanger and getting the run-down tennis court ready for action.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Working Out the Foyer
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas get a workout tackling a massive chandelier in the foyer and heavy exercise equipment in the club room. In the game room, a custom mural makes a statement and adds a touch of old-school charm to a modern space.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Extreme Exterior
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas take the exterior to the extreme by installing estate gates and revamping the landscape. It's all hands on deck to give this property some kicking curb appeal that will bring buyers to the door.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: A Modern Master
programme.desc: Rob takes the master bedroom to the edge by adding an exclusive balcony and luxurious details fit for modern royalty. Custom drapes and plenty of bling are enough to make this master suite sing.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Campbell Street Project
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis returns to her hometown of Detroit to save a 1920s home that suffered severe damage from a fire next door.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Calamity
programme.desc: Nicole is hired by one of her clients to rehab his cluttered, compact kitchen into a useable, restored space for his family.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitschy Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole tackles her grandparents' kitchen. Built in 1956, the kitchen has been around for over half a century, but was redone in the '90s, eliminating its mid-century modern charm. Nicole wants to restore the kitchen to how it looked when she was a child.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Pool Room Refresher
programme.desc: For Nicole's next project, it's gonna be sink or swim! The indoor pool that Nicole's grandfather built by hand is getting a much-needed refresher. First up, the safety and mechanical systems of the pool need to be overhauled.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: All About Family
programme.desc: Off the pool lies a dated family room, covered in wood paneling and boasting a large mechanical room for the pool equipment. Nicole sees opportunity for a beautiful bathroom, and an updated, retro family room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Mid-Century Bathroom Remade
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis saves the original Mid-Century bathroom in her grandparents' house in her classic style; by preserving critical elements while updating tired design choices.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Apartment Refresh
programme.desc: Nicole's grandparents' house sits on a sprawling five-acre parcel and has an apartment. Taking a break from the main house renovation, Nicole tackles the apartment with a series of fun, chic changes that don't cost a fortune.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Hearts of the Home
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis tackles the heart of her Grandparents' home, the living room and dining room. The most 'photographed' rooms in the house, these projects present Nicole with a very clear visual template to work from.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Mid-Century Bedroom Revival
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis tackles one of her biggest challenges yet. She tackles all of the original bedrooms in the home built by her grandparents. The previous owners trashed the original and design, now it's up to her to fix their mistakes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Between Bread
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes a Cleveland Polish Boy Sandwich.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: With My Hands
programme.desc: The chefs talk about dishes that are meant to be eaten with their fingers.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Filled With Envy
programme.desc: Find out which chefs covet recipes from other Food Network Stars.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Best Meal Deal
programme.desc: You don't have to sacrifice incredible food experiences in order to save a buck. Antonia Lofaso keeps her wallet full with irresistible Mexican munchies in Venice Beach, Calif., Duff Goldman saves a ton as he takes on the enormous Orca Platter.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sausages, Franks and Dogs
programme.desc: In Sagaponack, N.Y., Michael Symon heads to a smokehouse where succulent, slow-smoked pork ribs are mopped with a tangy, citrus barbecue sauce. In Columbus, Ohio, there's a beefy burger topped with smoky kielbasa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet Treats and Savory Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with triple-processed pork belly that's cured, brined and smoked to meaty perfection. In Seattle, tender braised lamb shoulder amps up a traditional breakfast hash.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smokehouse Reinventions
programme.desc: In Islip, N.Y., Michael Symon digs into a decadent, 17-layer smokehouse reinvention of lasagna with pork, brisket, bacon and mac and cheese. Then in Buffalo, a brewpub serves up the city's most famous export, buffalo chicken.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Supremely Smokey and Dizzyingly Delicious
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Savannah, where fried chicken and pancake tacos are a delicious reinvention of classic chicken and waffles. In Seattle, a burger with a house-made chorizo patty brings serious Spanish flavor to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Rad Rigs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is on the hunt for the most radical barbecue rigs, and he starts at The Pit Room in Houston, Texas, where special events call for a custom-built trailer that can cook up to 600 pounds of meat.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Barbecue and Barbacoa
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to tge Lone Star State to meet a family that specializes in Texas barbeque and Mexican barbacoa.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Chicken
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels across America in search of the 12 very best chicken dishes. From frying and baking to grilling, Roger is hanging out with chefs as they explore all the best ways to cook wings, pot pies, pizzas and other savory chicken dishes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a bite of Chicago's humble, hearty and world-renowned food scene. From juicy rib tips to zesty Polish sausages to experimental and edible works of art, Chicago's eats stay true to its roots.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Pigging Out
programme.desc: From sweet and salty Cuban sandwiches and zesty whole hog barbecue to mild kielbasa and melt-in-your-mouth cured ham, Andrew Zimmern explores all the best ways we pig out on the world's most popular meat - pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mumbai
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Mumbai's multicultural flavors and addictive ingredients. A city built on chaos and hard work, Mumbai showcases its history through its delicious eateries. The city's edible icons include deep-fried fish and prawns and saucy goat.

programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Big Balloon Race
programme.desc: Mickey helps Donald fly in the Big Balloon Race so he can win a big blue ribbon. They use stickers to patch up the balloon and an elephant helps weigh the balloon down after it flies into orbit. Later, they rescue Pete, who's stuck in a tree.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Jr.
programme.desc: Donald needs help teaching his young duckling prodigy Donald Jr. how to do the steps to a special song and dance routine.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Magical Mix-up
programme.desc: Goofy the Great accidentally causes Pluto's doghouse to magically disappear.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Comet
programme.desc: Mickey and pals are excitedly anticipating the arrival of Mickey's Comet.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy in the Sky
programme.desc: A bunch of balloons carry Daisy, Pluto and Minnie away in the sky.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Dance
programme.desc: Daisy wants to enter the talent show but suddenly comes down with a bad case of stage fright. Enlisting help from the viewer, Mickey and his pals help Daisy rehearse and build her confidence in time to wow the crowd.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Grasshopper
programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Daisy find her new friend, Wilbur the Grasshopper.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald of the Desert
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends travel to the faraway Desert to get sand for the Clubhouse Sandbox.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald the Genie
programme.desc: Donald becomes a genuine magical genie and realizes it is not as easy as it sounds when he is only able to grant one wish to each Clubhouse friend.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mouse vs. Machine/ Grandpa Beagle's Day Out
programme.desc: Mickey challenges Professor Von Drake's Self-Racing Racer to a race and Billy Beagle asks the Happy Helpers to help his grandpa with some errands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Roadsterettes! / Oh Happy Day!
programme.desc: Famous race car driver Pippa Powers visits Hot Dog Hills for a reunion with her old car club. The Happy Helpers must show Mr. McSnorter how to relax on vacation.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Agent Double-O-Goof/ Egg-xasperating!
programme.desc: While everyone prepares for the Queen of England to come for tea, Goofy is mistaken for a secret agent in charge of delivering a top-secret briefcase. The Happy Helpers are charged with watching Clara Cluck's egg while she runs errands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Hot Dog Daze Afternoon/ Super Sweet Helpers
programme.desc: On Mickey's day off, he continues getting called back to help at the garage. The Happy Helpers look after Mrs. Sweetums' candy store and factory.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Grand Food Truck Rally/ Cuckoo La-La
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals race in a grand food truck rally in Paris. While in Paris, the happy helpers help famous fashion designer Cuckoo La-La with a fashion show.

programme.title: Bluey: The Sleepover / Hide and Seek / Camping
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo's cousin Muffin shows up for a sleepover; Bluey plays a game of hide and seek with Bingo; Bluey goes camping and meets Jean-Luc.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's New Doghouse / The Fang Fairy
programme.desc: After Bob builds a doghouse for Keia, the pugs encourage her to host a puppy housewarming party. Rolly loses his first puppy tooth and can't wait for a visit from the Fang Fairy!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Take Your Dog to Work Day / Slumber Paw-ty
programme.desc: The pups lose an important part of Bob's presentation during Take Your Dog to Work Day. Bob, the pugs and Keia run out of popcorn at their first slumber party.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Big Day/ Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to cheer Hissy up by taking her to their favourite places. Later, A.R.F. is reprogrammed to take the pugs where they want, but not being them back.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Biggest Hero / Think Quick
programme.desc: Rocky gets jealous when Tiny suddenly becomes the go-to hero! Mazu may be a slow runner but is a quick thinker.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Seeing Stars/ A Tiny Triumph
programme.desc: Mazu and her three besties map the stars. Tiny’s artistic skills are put to use when the dinos are lost in the desert.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Impossible Race/ The Happiest Helpers Cruise!
programme.desc: Cuckoo Loca enters her first Roadster event. Then, the happy helpers become cruise directors on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Hi, Jinx!/ Pete's Junkyard Helpers
programme.desc: Emmy Lou meets Jinx the cat and gets the gang to help her find the kitty a new home. The Happy Helpers run Pete's junkyard while he takes his Mama out to lunch for her birthday.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library!/ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Adopt-a-Palooza/ The Legend of Captain Wunderbark
programme.desc: When a puppy gets lost at Adopt-A-Palooza, it's up to the pugs, Keia and their new friend to find it. Bingo, Rolly and Keia go off in search of Captain Wunderbark's long-lost ship.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Night of the Cat/ Catboy Does it Again
programme.desc: Catboy hears of a way to increase his cat power, and enlists Gekko and Owlette to help. Catboy falls prey to a Romeo remote that rewinds all action, making the night last forever.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Wolfy Mountain/ Romeo's Crystal Clear Plan
programme.desc: The Wolfy Kids overtake Mystery Mountain from Night Ninja. Romeo steals the Moon Crystal, but the PJ Masks are convinced Luna Girl is the culprit.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy

programme.desc: After the family falls apart, Magica preys on a vulnerable Scrooge to finally acquire his Lucky Dime.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War Part II: The Day of the Ducks!
programme.desc: As Magica's shadow army descends Duckburg into chaos, the family bands together to save Scrooge.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape To/ From Atlantis
programme.desc: Dewey's attempts to impress Scrooge on a trip to the Lost City of Atlantis leads to trouble. Donald tries to protect the boys from his new employer who is trying to destroy them.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Wendy Big and Tall/ Doppelfanger

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Cries and Dolls/ Hypnosferatu
programme.desc: Mavis and her friends put their ideas for the hotel into motion.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Fate of the Roommates
programme.desc: Honey Lemon learns that she can return to her dorm, but Go Go realizes she doesn't want her to move out. The team looks to stop a secret underground racing league.

programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wedding

programme.desc: Bungee-jumping newlyweds plunge off a bridge only to come face-to-face with a corpse lying at the bottom of a gorge. When the victim's bones begin to foam, the team has only 24 hours to investigate before the bones disintegrate all together.

programme.title: Bones: The Salt in the Wounds
programme.desc: Booth and Brennan investigate a petrified human body found buried in a mound of salt in a city de-icing truck. They discover that the victim was a pregnant 16-year-old high school volleyball player who was allegedly part of a 'pregnancy pact.'

programme.title: Basketball
programme.desc: Basketball.

programme.title: Inside the NBA

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: If It Bleeds, It Leads
programme.desc: NCIS Special Agent Brody believes that a sailor hit by a party bus in the French Quarter is connected to her sister's death after the team discovers similarities between the two. Also, the team prepares for St. Patrick's Day festivities in New Orleans.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Means to An End
programme.desc: The NCIS team discovers a surveillance van filled with photos documenting Special Agent Pride's every move after his daughter is attacked on campus and placed in protective custody.

programme.title: Charmed: Engaged and Confused
programme.desc: Piper organizes and engagement party for Paige and Henry, but the wedding is put in jeopardy when the couple begins to get cold feet. Meanwhile, a demon kidnaps Christy in order to lure The Charmed Ones into attacking the Triad.

programme.title: Charmed: Generation Hex
programme.desc: While Cupid takes Phoebe on a journey through her past romances in an attempt to revive her excitement for love, a group of magical teens come to the manor seeking refuge from demons. Elsewhere, Christy tests Billie by refusing to see their parents.

programme.title: Charmed: The Torn Identity
programme.desc: As Coop tries to find the perfect love match for Phoebe, he realizes he has fallen for Phoebe. Meanwhile, Paige has difficulty balancing married life and her responsibilities as a Charmed One and Piper interrogates the demons who killed Billie's parents.

programme.title: Charmed: The Jung and the Restless
programme.desc: Phoebe and Piper formulate a plan when they suspect that Billie and Christy are the "Ultimate Power". Meanwhile, Christy traps the sisters in a dream state and Billie must decide if she will team up with Christy to dethrone The Charmed Ones.

programme.title: Supernatural: Devil's Trap
programme.desc: Sam and Dean seek help from an old family friend who helps them lure Meg into a trap in order to find out where their father is being held prisoner. Later, a full battle ensues between the Winchesters and the demon they have been searching for.

programme.title: Supernatural: In My Time of Dying
programme.desc: Sam, Dean and John were left for dead after the Demon plowed a semi into the Impala. Now, one of the Winchesters hovers between life and death, as the surviving family must face an old and powerful adversary.

programme.title: Supernatural: Everybody Loves a Clown
programme.desc: Sam and Dean listen to a message on John's cell phone from a woman named Ellen and decide to track her down. At a small town carnival, a clown is persuading children to let him into their home so he can murder their parents.

programme.title: Supernatural: Bloodlust
programme.desc: Sam and Dean meet Gordon, a fellow demon hunter who has been systematically killing vampires in a small town. Dean immediately bonds with the older man. Sam decides not all supernatural beings are evil and forces Dean to choose sides.

programme.title: Bones: The Doctor in the Den
programme.desc: The half-eaten body of Cam's former fiancé is found in a tiger cage at the zoo, and Booth and Brennan determine the death was no accident. Meanwhile, Angela is obsessed by sexual thoughts while maintaining her self-imposed celibacy.

programme.title: Bones: The Science in the Physicist
programme.desc: Booth and Brennan are on the case when shattered, pulverized human remains are found in a garbage bag at a photo shoot. When the team discovers a meteorite shard lodged in the victim's ear, they are led to the Collar Institute of Science in D.C.

programme.title: Movie: Deep Impact
programme.desc: As a comet is on a collision course with earth, humans have to prepare for their survival. They randomly select eight hundred thousand people to be saved in order to keep the human race alive.

programme.title: Movie: I Am Legend

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Love in an Elevator

programme.title: Movie: The Last Bridesmaid

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche Delivers
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter wants to give birth in a birthing center while Blanche is preoccupied by the possibility of Rebecca delivering in a local hospital. Blanche doesn't want to be embarrassed by the fact that her daughter was artificially inseminated.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Once in St. Olaf
programme.desc: Rose makes a stunning discovery while admitting a patient at the hospital. Meanwhile, Sophia has to have surgery, but a mix-up occurs after the operation and Sophia becomes lost in the hospital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: If at Last You Do Succeed

programme.desc: Blanche is dreading her birthday and Dorothy helps Sophia with 'Meals on Wheels.'

programme.desc: The Wojcik's home continues to undergo much needed renovations.

programme.title: The Closer: Aftertaste
programme.desc: A young woman at a high-priced restaurant is murdered; Brenda turns 40.

programme.title: The Closer: To Protect and Serve
programme.desc: A murder hits close to home when a dead body is discovered in Detective Lt. Provenza's garage. When Provenza and Flynn want to make it to a Dodgers game on time, the body disappears and the Homicide Division tries to cover its negligence.

programme.title: The Closer: Out of Focus
programme.desc: When a paparazzi photographer appears to have killed himself by jumping out of a hotel window, Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson is called in to investigate. Fritz is getting calls from a female colleague, which makes Brenda jealous.

programme.desc: Brenda starts an investigation when severed body parts are found in the dumpster. The victim is a popular porn star who also happens to have HIV+. Many of the co-stars may have also been exposed to HIV.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Maybe Baby
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie contemplate having a baby; Doug talks to Arthur about fatherhood.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Queasy Rider

programme.title: The King of Queens: Female Problems

programme.title: The King of Queens: Parent Trapped

programme.title: The King of Queens: Get Away

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Revenge Killing
programme.desc: In 1987, a group of teens, hell-bent on revenge, killed local businessman John Hill who had raped their friend Jennifer. 30 years later, Chris Cuomo speaks to Lisa Harris, the only member of the group who was sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Grizzly Bait
programme.desc: Arctic temperatures and a hungry grizzly wreak havoc on a struggling homestead. The Raneys leap to action with huge builds including a blacksmith shop, but tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Honey I Torched the Homestead
programme.desc: Fire is a constant threat for this Oregon homestead. Livestock should be meat, but here they are family pets. The Raneys must teach a hungry family to working together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Hog Heaven and Homestead Hell
programme.desc: The Raneys answer an SOS from a family displaced by their failing homestead. Marty must move a cabin onto a flood-proof foundation. Matt teaches an ill mother how to face her fear of invasive hogs, and Misty crafts a rice patty garden in a flood zone.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Fire and Gold
programme.desc: With extra facts and bonus scenes: The Raneys overhaul a faulty electrical system and build the first-ever hydro-electric wheel on Little Sustina River to prevent the risk of a big wildfire.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Moose Mayhem
programme.desc: To save a single mom and her daughter from rampaging moose and secure a source of food, Marty builds a bridge across a murky creek to access more property, Matt teaches predator deterrent techniques, and Misty builds a snow-proof greenhouse.

programme.title: Reclaimed: Seeking Ore
programme.desc: Alex and Kevin are modern prospectors who look for business opportunities on old mining claims. Homesteader Judd and his family will need their help to re-open the mine, and build three much needed weatherproof structures before winter hits.

programme.desc: Jared 'Cappie' Capp showcases the luxury of off-grid living by building a modern home in the Black Hills of South Dakota. This stunning all-solar-powered abode will have a wood-burning fireplace, gourmet kitchen and a 400-square-foot loft.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Nevada Thirst
programme.desc: In the Nevada desert, the Kondors' homestead has turned to dust. The Raneys discover rattler infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms, but when Marty finds the Kondors have no water, he gambles all to save the dying homestead.
