programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Industrial Asphalt Sealant
programme.desc: Michael trains his coworkers how to hold a dog who can't hold it. A man can vanish into a manhole, and maybe even a manhole can vanish itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pineapple Breeze
programme.desc: Michael reveals an exciting new way to fix a tablet, makes a drink that's impossible to swallow and turns a dog into the smartest animal in the world.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Essence of the Wings
programme.desc: Michael turns leftovers into beauty products at a soap shop, and at a record store, he shows a hip-hop fan how to jump around. Plus, at a children's store, Michael's co-worker learns about the dangers of babysitting.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Total Face Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure and later reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Relax the Back
programme.desc: Michael shocks people with every trick in the book, including a voice controlled page turner and outfit changes that almost get him recognized. And later, Michael amazes a trainee with a weightless mattress.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Game Friendly
programme.desc: Find out what tricks make Michael the most nervous, when the show needs extra security on hand and which trick was tried 18 times before anyone noticed.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Faux Pas to Wear
programme.desc: Why Michael says "shenanigans" during some tricks, his favorite trick of all time and why the crew had to shut down production for an hour.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Framing Canon
programme.desc: Find out which magic team member knows how to ride a unicycle, what trick almost used an alpaca and which trick nearly resulted in Michael slicing open his neck.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Skull With a Flower Hat
programme.desc: The trick that nearly burned Michaels face, who he gets in prank wars with on-set, and which trick did he created a prop for.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Dead Man Walking

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: EggShaq
programme.desc: Find out what happens when the owner of a business is a big fan of the show and why guest star Shaquille O'Neal insisted on not being told how the tricks worked.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Just Made History
programme.desc: Find out which bizarre animal was the first choice to play the 'alien' in one of Michael's most popular tricks and what ingredient was so gross it was replaced last minute.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Just a Miker
programme.desc: Find out when Michael's favourite time to avoid contact is, which prank was almost too silly for him to go through with and what bug-infested prop wound up in a dining room.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Skirting By

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Never Give Up
programme.desc: One shot at Bobby Flay wasn't enough for Italian chef Pasquale Cozzolino and Canada's infamous Ivana Raca, who are back for more. Iron Chefs Alex Guarnaschelli and Stephanie Izard give the play-by-play and dole out their final shot at redemption.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Surf's Up
programme.desc: Philly's finest, Paras Shah, and Hawaiian chef Sheldon Simeon are brought in to beat Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Skating By

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Take A Bao
programme.desc: Suchanan Aksornnan battles Richard Hales and David Alan Grier and Carla Hall must decide who can beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: A few years ago, Keith and Stephanie's restaurant 'Mama E's Soul Food Restaurant' in Oklahoma City was thriving and was featured on 'Diners, Drive-ins and Dives.' A failed attempt at opening a second location put a strain on their finances and marriage.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: An Owner Losing Control
programme.desc: Robert returns to Bradenton, FL to follow up on Theresa’s Restaurant. Four years ago he helped pull the restaurant out of a rut and taught the owner some management techniques.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Help Is On the Way
programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine is in Akron, Ohio to save Edgar's Restaurant. Fixing a restaurant in only two days is impossible enough but when Glenn, the restaurant's owner, is less than honest, it creates a whole new set of problems.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Fiddle Around!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: It's a Date
programme.desc: Things get shrewd when Iron Chef's Alex Guarnaschelli and Alton Brown join forces. It's up to partners in business and in life, chefs Lisa Carlson and Carrie Summer, to outsmart the one and only Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Proper Smackdown
programme.desc: English chef Ian Winslade and Southern chef Geoff Rhyne must get through the challenges of the star ingredient before they can have a proper smackdown against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Tropical Punch

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Hoarding Potential

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Turf Wars

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Pando Express

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Firehouse Functional Kitchen
programme.desc: A family is anxious to turn their dark, closed off kitchen into an open concept living space with plenty of upgrades.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cracked Flip

programme.title: House Hunters: Sticking It Out in Lansing, New York
programme.desc: A couple searches for a bigger home in Lansing, New York. However, he wants a contemporary space with privacy from the neighbours, but she dreams of a farmhouse with an open concept and lots of character.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Spreadsheets and Style in Spain
programme.desc: An Indiana woman wants to follow her bucket list to La Safor, Spain, but her husband is reluctant to move unless their grown children are willing to visit.

programme.title: House Hunters: Beach vs. Pool in Virginia
programme.desc: A Virginia couple with two young children hunts for a big family home near Chesapeake. She insists on at least five bedrooms and a big master closet, while he's focused on a media room.

programme.title: House Hunters: Newlyweds in San Francisco's East Bay Burbs
programme.desc: A San Francisco couple is venturing to the suburbs of the East Bay to find their first home. He's after a clean, sharp, modern home, which reminds her of a doctor's office, but her preferred midcentury style leaves him feeling cold.

programme.title: HGTV Dream Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day and Brian Patrick Flynn team up to build and design the HGTV Dream Home 2020 in Hilton Head Island, SC. Nestled among live oaks and green marsh, the all-season coastal home is built from foundation to finished gem along the stunning waterfront.

programme.title: House Hunters: Size or Style in St. Paul
programme.desc: A couple living with her parents is eager to find their own home in St. Paul, Minnesota. He wants lots of space and a room for his musical instruments, but she's craving a cozy house with lots of original features.

programme.title: House Hunters: Mother-Daughter House Hunt
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter hunt for a home for the both of them in Danbury, Connecticut.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Something's Brewing in Chania, Greece
programme.desc: A couple is following her job to Chania, Greece, but can't agree on where to live. He wants the quite of the country with space to work on his brewing hobby, but she's looking for the vibrant city life of downtown.

programme.title: House Hunters: Settling in South Dakota
programme.desc: A military family is on the hunt for a home in Rapid City, SD. He wants a split-level house with potential for renovation projects as well as a 'basement bunker.' She, however, is hoping to find a move-in ready ranch-style home.

programme.title: House Hunters: Brand New Sought in Salt Lake
programme.desc: A young Utah couple debates between a brand-new home and a fixer-upper in the Salt Lake City area.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Fresh Start in Uvita, Costa Rica
programme.desc: A Nashville couple that separated due to overwhelming lifestyles felt more connected during a recent family vacation to Costa Rica. Now they're moving their family to Uvita to cement their family bond.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Why Did We Wait So Long?

programme.title: Bahamas Life: A Bahamian 25th Anniversary
programme.desc: A couple decides to skip the party and celebrate their 25th anniversary by buying their dream home in Eleuthera. They have their eyes on the prize and are determined to find the perfect Bahamian house to spend the next 25 years together.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: An Exuma High

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Laid-back Nassau Lifestyle

programme.desc: A London-born woman searches for a private sanctuary away from her busy life in Los Angeles on Eleuthera.

programme.desc: A Canadian couple fell in love with the Bahamas, the people and culture during his appointment at a church in Nassau.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Satan Pit
programme.desc: Rose battles the murderous Ood and the Doctor finds his every belief being challenged to the core when the Pit beckons. With the planet threatening to fall into the Black Hole, the Doctor must make the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Love and Monsters

programme.title: Doctor Who: Fear Her

programme.desc: Experts wonder if a strange pattern that appears in a field is an extraterrestrial response to a message sent to an alien star cluster in 1974, and using cutting-edge science, they uncover its true origin.

programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibal Death Pit
programme.desc: A strange circular forest is found next to a notorious cannibal site. Then, when an eerie crater is spotted in Siberia, experts uncover if it could be evidence of Nikola Tesla's doomsday device.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Doomsday Forest
programme.desc: When mysterious structures are discovered deep in a remote forest, experts investigate if this strange site was the long-lost birthplace of a top-secret Nazi project that produced some of the deadliest weapons the world had ever seen.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: NASA's Journey to Mars
programme.desc: NASA is on a mission to send humans to Mars within just 15 years, but to reach this next frontier of space exploration, experts must discover brand-new technology and cutting-edge science that protects astronauts from the Red Planet's deadliest killers.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Universe's Deadliest

programme.desc: A man is recorded surviving two lightning strikes in moments. Cameras spot strange lights in the sky in Norway, turning a remote area into a UFO hot spot. A bizarre glowing object is caught on tape at a museum, and some wonder if it's an alien artifact.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Night of the Chupacabra
programme.desc: A camera captures footage of a Chupacabra-like beast. At an observatory on Hawaii's Mauna Kea, cameras record a mysterious explosion that looks like a nuclear bomb detonated in space. Video of spontaneous combustion is taken at a haunted bar.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Midnight Train to Hell
programme.desc: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls. When something terrifying emerges from a mysterious lake in Ireland, experts wonder if it could be a modern-day leviathan.

programme.title: MythBusters: Duct Tape Canyon
programme.desc: Lost in the wilderness, Adam and Jamie survive the desert, repel down canyon cliff-faces, and brave Class 5 rapids, all with duct tape and bubble wrap.

programme.title: MythBusters: Mythssion Impossible
programme.desc: The MythBusters test three impossible idioms: Can you herd cats? Can you catch a greased pig? And can you cram ten pounds of poop into a five pound bag?

programme.title: MythBusters: Titanic Survival
programme.desc: The guys team up with Titanic director James Cameron to debunk the most requested myth in Mythbuster history. Kari, Grant and Tory ride a rocket-powered surfboard.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: When Mountains Explode
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts using cutting-edge explosives to turn entire mountains into gravel-sized bits essential for construction, and their investigation reveals the high-powered, hi-tech process behind this dangerous work.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: FBI Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts from the FBI's bomb squad to reveal the cutting-edge forensics and technology required to investigate deadly bomb threats and neutralize them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Ghost Ship of the Desert

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.desc: In North Port, Florida, police receive a call that a young mother has gone missing from her home. In an effort to find her, detectives follow a trail of incoming 911 calls that reveal a heartbreaking story more horrific than they could have ever imagined.

programme.title: Shattered: The Bodies Out Back
programme.desc: 1986. A 13-year-old girl escapes her captors, then lives in fear they'll return to kill her. A young boy learns his father's fate and realizes his nightmares are memories, and a prison break leads a rookie cop on the hunt for two ruthless murderers.

programme.title: Shattered: False Prophet
programme.desc: 1994. Middle River, MD. Christmas Day. A murder rocks a family's Christmas celebration... a mother prepares a holiday dinner for a son who never arrives... and a detective unearths a dark secret that shatters a town's faith.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Jump Shot
programme.desc: Hollywood 'golden boy' Gavin Smith, a 20th Century Fox executive and former star UCLA basketball player goes missing. For years, his family and detectives search tirelessly for answers, but a group of heartless characters holds fast to their secrets.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Mother Dear
programme.desc: The strangled body of 47-year-old mother, Joyce Aparo, is found off the side of the road 70 miles from her home in Glastonbury, Connecticut. The investigation will lead detectives into a dark world of abuse, sexual obsession and lies.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Gone Girl
programme.desc: The body of 20-year old student Sandra Bonaventure is discovered in a garbage bag, on the sidewalk in New York City. The trail of clues will eventually lead detectives to a cold-hearted killer, with an astonishing talent for deception.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What the Doctor Ordered
programme.desc: A hotshot surgeon on vacation with his girlfriend divulges a dark plot to murder his ex-wife.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: ABC News Correspondent Linzie Janis speaks exclusively to Nathan Carman about his rescue from the ill-fated fishing trip that claimed his mother Linda's life.

programme.title: 20/20: Sweetie Swindle
programme.desc: Ralph Raines, Jr.'s new psychic really could predict his future, even a new wife and child. Everything was looking up-except his bank balance. Soon, blonde wigs, fake accents, and a baby named Giorgio Armani would show no one was whom they seemed to be.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death for Dessert
programme.desc: Sparks fly when picture-perfect divorcés Tami and Alan meet at a wedding - within months they're married too. But when Tami starts uses her sultry good looks to get what she wants from every man she meets, one of them will end up dead.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Big League Murder
programme.desc: Tommy and Tamara Kane appear to have it all. He's a pro football player for the Seattle Seahawks; she's a devoted mother living in Montreal. Distance keeps this couple together, but when Tommy's career ends, the proximity will tear them apart.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Burning Love
programme.desc: Hattie Rennolds is struggling to provide for her daughter in Baton Rouge when she meets her dream man. Within a year they're married and Hattie is pregnant. But when they divorce, chaos enters an already volatile custody dispute, and someone ends up dead.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Second Chance at Death
programme.desc: It's love at second sight, when Antoinette and Spencer hook up at their ten-year high school reunion. But after decades of supporting her husband financially, Antoinette realizes she'd be better off without... And the consequences are tragic.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Real Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace is the most famous Scot in history. In 1296, Scotland is invaded by English King Edward I and only one man is prepared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries
programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Reclaiming the Rec Room
programme.desc: Nicole tackles the basement. With space at a premium, Nicole must battle water, structural problems, dilapidated windows, and poorly placed duct work to turn a neglected area into a much needed gathering space.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Reborn
programme.desc: After an improperly winterized basement bathroom springs some serious leaks, Nicole remains determined to rebuild the bathroom better than ever. She also adds an egress window to the basement and builds out a basement guest suite.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: One Extraordinary Exterior
programme.desc: Nicole adds gutters, a new driveway and entirely does the house in stucco like the original. To complete this magnificent transformation Nicole restores the original brick front porch and tops everything off with some tasteful, but stunning landscaping.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Red Barn Reborn
programme.desc: Nicole takes on her most personal project yet, her grandfather's red barn. The barn has fallen into disrepair and requires a great deal of structural work to make it safe and strong.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Case Avenue House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis heads to St. Paul for the first time to work on a home in an up-and-coming neighborhood.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 25th Street Project
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis works to restore a 1920s bungalow and must tackle a ton of brickwork. Then, she transforms the unfinished attic into a one-of-a-kind master suite and restores the kitchen cabinets to create one of the home's most dazzling features.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Downtown Kannapolis
programme.desc: The Dawgs split in two groups to salvage doors, sinks and more in Kannapolis, North Carolina.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Jamestown Moose Lodge
programme.desc: Eager to save some late Victorian architecture, the 'dawgs' accept an invitation to salvage a hundred-year-old Moose Lodge in Jamestown, NY. The ten hour drive proves worth it as they collect unique stair spindles and perplexing turrets.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Firehouse Number 7
programme.desc: Firefighters ask the Dawgs to salvage what they can from their old fire house, and the team works with them to incorporate the materials into a new facility. Then, the guys heads to Highpoint, NC, to fill up their trucks with international treasures.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Christiansburg House
programme.desc: The team travels down the road to Christiansburg to salvage an old home. They get some good meat and potatoes from the house, including the mantles, banisters and all the gingerbread trim. Also, Mike and Tay build a couch that can fit a Whiteside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Escamilla Job
programme.desc: Natalie Escamilla and Jim Fell hate their 1950's bathroom. Since it's current, outdated condition has been deemed unlivable and entirely too small, it's time for a renovation.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Grey Job
programme.desc: A grandfather needs a little more personal space in his family's home, where is close and available to help with his grandchildren but can still live his bachelor lifestyle.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Harvey Job
programme.desc: Randi and George Harvey love most of their home except for their master bathroom. They believe a renovation is definitely in order, but with 30-year-old 'hair babies' and falling mirrors, this project proves it's easier said than done.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Hillebrand Job
programme.desc: Kayli Hillebrand hates her old kitchen. She enlists the help of her best friend, Megan Langford, to tear it apart and start new. Although these two work well together, they never imagined what sort of problems they would encounter.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Ossorio Job
programme.desc: Carolyn Ossorio and her husband Paul hate their old, rundown master bathroom and want to make it useful again. Although this couple knows how to work together, a bloody hand and busted plumbing put their patience to the test.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Ramsey Job
programme.desc: Anthony Thomas and his mother, Lisa Ramsey, have been renovating Anthony's 106 year old house. They're finally ready for the biggest project, the kitchen.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Sherman Job
programme.desc: Kim and John Sherman hate their laundry room space. With lots of kids making it messy, it's time for a change. They want to transform the space into a mudroom and a laundry room.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Adams Job
programme.desc: Khalila and Marchello Adams love their daughter, Laila. She is their princess and their princess deserves the best bathroom. They plan to take out the floors, rip out the shower, and tile it all.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Bartelski Job
programme.desc: Chris and Allie are going crazy sharing a bathroom with their two young kids. They are ready for some privacy so they plan to create a master suite out of their bedroom by knocking out the closet and turning it into a bathroom.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Burquest Job
programme.desc: Sunday Burquest hates her guest bathroom, and has finally talked her husband Jeff into remodeling it. With some electrical issues, and Sunday's vibrant personality, they tough it out to try to beat their deadline.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Victorian Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian Bungalow for a military veteran and his daughter. The project grows in scale when unexpected problems are discovered and it becomes a complete restoration.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1913 craftsman bungalow for a young couple with a baby on the way. He's challenged with finding a way to bring back the natural wood in the house while still making it bright and welcoming.

programme.title: Restored: 1915 Arts And Crafts
programme.desc: Brett Waterman gets the chance to restore an enormous Arts and Crafts home with six bedrooms for a family that grew from four children to eight children in just two years.

programme.title: Restored: 1922 American Colonial Arts and Crafts
programme.desc: Brett takes on a bright pink arts and crafts home with American Colonial elements. He uncovers lots of hidden features while returning the house to its 1922 roots.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Local Legends
programme.desc: From sandwiches to desserts, Noah discovers foods that put cities on the map and some that present an entire state.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Tons of Taters
programme.desc: Ingenious fair vendors use the humble potato to create some amazing and original midway food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There's Something About Cherry
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in Macon, Georgia, for the International Cherry Blossom Festival and some of the prettiest, pinkest carnival treats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seoul Dip Sisters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets festive at the California Mid-Winter Fair and Fiesta! He's sampling the Seoul Dip- a Korean twist on the French Dip- then keeps things spicy with the Diablo Dog before going for a sweet finish with the Supreme Samoa doughnut stack.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: We're going after picture-perfect dishes that taste as good as they look.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: #throwback
programme.desc: We're talking about throwback dishes that are better now than ever before.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Voted "Most Popular"
programme.desc: We're sharing seven of the most popular go-to dishes from restaurants across the country.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On Wheels
programme.desc: Ditch the four walls, head outside, and get your fill of those portable powerhouses known as food trucks. Jeff Mauro gets happy about an angry lobster sandwich from the Happy Lobster Truck in Chicago.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Rise And Dine
programme.desc: Wake up and get ready to dine on some of the country's best breakfast dishes starting with Martha Stewart's favorite biscuits and country ham found in Nashville. Scott Conant then brings a new take on French toast.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brilliantly Baked
programme.desc: It's time to indulge in some of the best baked goods imaginable as Martha Stewart shows off a beautifully perfect brioche she can't get enough of in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow

programme.title: Movie: American Woman
programme.desc: After her daughter disappears a woman raises her young grandson.

programme.title: Movie: Van Helsing
programme.desc: A famed monster hunter must battle Count Dracula, the Wolf Man and Frankenstein's Monster.

programme.title: Movie: Unfriended

programme.title: Movie: Primeval

programme.title: Movie: Bottled With Love
programme.desc: After being stood up, Abbey gets inspired to open her heart in a letter, put it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out.

programme.title: Movie: A Royal Winter
programme.desc: A woman flies to Europe for some soul searching, and sight-seeing, with a friend. While there she encounters a handsome European playboy prince.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Under the Stars
programme.desc: A man loses his job right before Christmas, so he takes a temporary job selling trees. While at work, he meets a woman and her son, who are dealing with the sudden loss of her father. The two get to talking, and out of their loss, love grows.

programme.title: Movie: All for Love
programme.desc: A romance novelist worries she's lost her touch after a string of unsuccessful events. She sets her new book around a Navy Seal hero and dives into research with a retired Seal who teaches her skills she didn't know she had.

programme.title: Movie: Love Under the Rainbow
programme.desc: A woman has dreamt her whole life about finding her true love and starting a family. Now, she's a teacher who is still on her quest for love. When a new architect moves to town, romance is in the air for both of them.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweeter Side of Life
programme.desc: A woman is left penniless after her divorce, and though she wants nothing more than to return to her high-class life, spending time with her father in her hometown causes her to see things differently.

programme.title: Movie: Date With Love
programme.desc: After a-list actress, Alex Allen, has an epic Hollywood meltdown, she is in need of some positive publicity. Salvation comes in the form of a small town boy's video 'promposal' in which the student invites Alex to prom.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Fall and Order
programme.desc: A woman returns home to save her dad's annual fall festival on her family's pumpkin farm. While there, she runs into an old rival, and sparks fly.

programme.title: Movie: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: A man and woman are very different people; she's a down-to-earth high school teacher and he's a reserved New York businessman. So, when they get engaged, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: Movie: Love in Paradise
programme.desc: A Western movie star is forced to spend a weekend doing PR at a dude ranch. When his fans learn he's terrified of horses, he sets out to prove to them that he really does have what it takes to be a rancher.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Ice
programme.desc: A former figure skater gets an improbably shot to reclaim skating glory when a young coach sees greatness in her. They find their love of skating goes far beyond the ice.

programme.title: Movie: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: A woman burned by a boyfriend on New Year’s escapes on a ski getaway and is snowed in with a handsome entrepreneur.

programme.title: Futurama

programme.title: South Park: Handicar
programme.desc: Timmy's successful new car service makes him a lot of enemies.

programme.title: South Park: Dead Kids

programme.title: South Park: Hummels and Heroin

programme.title: South Park: Human Cent-iPad

programme.title: South Park: Go Fund Yourself

programme.title: South Park: Royal Pudding
programme.desc: The Prince of Canada is about to take a Princess and Ike is obsessed with the Royal Wedding.

programme.desc: Rosebud Baker reveals her grandfather was a secretary of state, Jordan Temple recounts getting pulled over in a cab, and Josh Adam Meyers critiques a Journey music video.

programme.title: South Park: The Tale of Scrotie McBoogerballs
programme.desc: The boys are given a controversial book to read in school and it inspires them to write one of their own. They convince Butters to take credit for the filth that they have written, but become jealous when he is hailed as a literary genius.

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park: Erection Day

programme.title: South Park: You're Not Yelping
programme.desc: Cartman considers himself the top online restaurant reviewer in South Park.

programme.desc: The boys become obsessed with religion and redemption after they're scared by a sermon about Hell. Meanwhile, Saddam returns to Hell and tries to have Satan's new boyfriend 'taken care of.'

programme.title: Movie: Psycho Wedding Crasher
programme.desc: Jenna, a young dressmaker, looks for a wedding of her own as an escape from her abusive aunt. After meeting engaged couple Marci and Glenn, Jenna is convinced that Glenn should be hers and will do anything to make it happen.

programme.title: Movie: Psycho Stripper
programme.desc: A dance studio instructor becomes the obsession of the male exotic dancer from her bachelorette party who will stop at nothing to keep her from getting married.

programme.title: Movie: Psycho Mother-In-Law
programme.desc: A woman is thrilled to finally walk down the aisle, that is, until her mother, and mother-in-law to be have a fateful encounter that leaves the entire wedding in shambles.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Deadly Trespass
programme.desc: When a wealthy neighbor begins buying up Montana land and restricting access to the public mountain trails beyond, one man cuts the locks and ends up dead.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Killing Spree
programme.desc: A string of murders targeting a pizza chain and its employees leads to a nationwide manhunt for a killer hell-bent on revenge.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Obsession at the Office
programme.desc: When a lovers' spat ends up in the hospital parking lot, a biochemist’s obsession with a coworker and her murderous means are exposed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Lost and Found

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: Hunting for Giant Bass on Lake Arbuckle

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Last Resorts

programme.title: Addictive Fishing: Anclote Chill
programme.desc: Capt. Blair Wiggins and Capt. Greg DeVault fish North of Tampa in cold winter conditions. for speckled seatrout and redfish.

programme.title: The Next Bite: Trolling Leadcore for Deep Water Reservoir River Walleye
programme.desc: Keith Kavjecz and Greg Fishman explore Francis Case Reservoir in search of deep water walleye.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Tarpon On Fire

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Jacks Be Boiling
programme.desc: Justin and fellow Captain Kyle Pitts speed down the Intercoastal Waterway to find Jack Crevalle in a feeding frenzy.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Stranglehold
programme.desc: Dusty Crum and his team of snake hunters devise a plan to stop Florida's invasive pythons from spreading north and becoming a national emergency.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Snake Researcher

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Well Digger

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Poo Pot Maker
programme.desc: Just when Mike thought he had seen it all, he is hired at a cow farm that specializes in making gardening pots out of cattle poop. Mike later opens up the mailbag and answers a viewer's question on a segment where Mike is bitten by a snake.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wild Goose Chase
programme.desc: A team of workers round up a flock of wild geese in the tundra, with airplanes.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Leather Tanner

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vanishing Daycare
programme.desc: Michael transforms a t-shirt at a thrift store, and his aid at a daycare thinks she loses more than her mind. Plus, Michael's helper at a museum runs scared when a sculpture slithers away.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.desc: At a deli, Michael bakes bread with power tools, and in a tux store, his outfit change doesn't suit his customer. Plus, at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, Michael swings for the fences with a fiery trick that stuns his helper.

programme.desc: Leslie and the parks team put together a memorial service for a dearly departed friend. Meanwhile, Tom makes a big life decision.

programme.title: Movie: What to Expect When You're Expecting
programme.desc: Five interconnected couples come to understand love and that life does not always deliver what you expect.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Time Tested Treasures
programme.desc: Host John Catucci travels to Ontario's wilderness to discover a hidden gem in Busters BBQ, where blueberries are the key to killer sauce. John also visits the Argo Café in Vancouver, B.C. where they serve up everything from your typical diner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Decadent Dishes
programme.desc: Guy goes coast-to-coast for decadent dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tried and True
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a roadside shack in Kittery serving the same fried clam recipe since 1956. He also visits a go to burger spot in Washington, D.C., and an Italian joint that has been around for 45 years.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homemade and Homebrewed
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's mixing' his love of home cooking with his appreciation of homebrew. In Chicago, Ill., a dive refines small plate Mexican with dishes like shiitake mushroom empanadas and flautas with homemade queso fresco.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faves, New Craves
programme.desc: In Annapolis, Maryland, two Irish brothers serving up food from their homeland with a twist, like Guinness fried oysters with homemade coleslaw.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fish, Fries and Feet
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's tackling everything from land to sea. In Des Moines, the funky fusion joint serving up unique burritos alongside off-the-chain bulgogi masa fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' International
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbin' gangster global grub. In Houston, a Jamaican joint knocking it out of the park with their oxtail and curry goat. Plus, a Lebanese stop serving up mom's specialties like kibbie balls and kabobs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From The Sea
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads back to see what the Triple D Nation is cookin' up from under the sea. For starters, an oyster shuckin' shack is putting a new spin on an old favorite in the Big Easy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grab and Grub
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into joints where you can literally grab all kinds of grub, starting with a Chicago-style spot in Tucson, Ariz., firing up deep-dish pie and twisted-up breadsticks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rollin' in the Dough
programme.desc: Guy visits Mesa, Arizona for a legit Hawaiian joint serving island specialities including a meaty bun, and Tucson for a place serving up saucy sandwiches and spinach dip calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Little Lighter
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is lightening the load on this trip, starting in Boston, where he pops into Triple D's first diner to check out the egg-white omelets. Then, a Cuban joint in Los Angeles is trading in bread for plantains and stuffing avocado with fresh fish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken Trifecta
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diggin' into some winner winner chicken dinners! In Maui, Hawaii, it's a star-studded stop at Mick Fleetwood's joint serving the rocker's mom's favourite chicken, plus a dish that musician Sammy Hagar dives right into.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Coastal Cuisine
programme.desc: The sun is out and the surf is high as Guy Fieri hits up some ultimate DDD spots by the shore. First, he's in Honolulu to say 'Hi' to an old buddy who's reelin' in fresh poke and smokin' pork by the plateful.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Loaded, Stuffed and Fried
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and digging into joints that are loading it, stuffing it and frying it. In Santa Fe, N.M., a farm-to-table gem putting out hearty goodness like bison gravy fries and a lights-out lamb sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavor Adventure
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a culinary trip filled with adventurous flavour. In Los Angeles, a funky spot is all about filling bowls with eclectic eats. In Norfolk, Virginia, a market and restaurant has Mexican specialties that you probably haven't seen before.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bird and Beef
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns to bagels. In Portsmouth, an amped up deli serves up lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Ooey, Gooey and Cheesy
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets messy in New Orleans with a bacon-onion jam, brie and brioche burger.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Snowed In
programme.desc: The Kitchen is snowed in, so it's the perfect time to cook up a storm, starting with Sunny Anderson's triple-decker E.A.B.L.T. Geoffrey Zakarian warms things up with a sweet potato and corn chowder, and Jeff Mauro and Katie Lee make desserts in mugs.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cooking for Jeffrey: Dinner Party 101
programme.desc: Ina Garten is teaching Dinner Party 101 to her great friend, actress Debra Monk. The foolproof meal plan includes roast chicken with bread and arugula salad, a stunning easy cheese board, tri-berry crumbles and a table-setting tutorial.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Giada's 2nd Annual Film Festival Party
programme.desc: Giada de Laurentiis hosts her second annual Film Festival Party and invites her guests to make their own short films. She pulls out all the stops with a Hollywood-themed room and easy-to-eat menu that includes chicken skewers and eggplant dip.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Healthy Kickstart
programme.desc: After years on tour with husband Garth Brooks, Trisha Yearwood is looking forward to settling back into a routine. Always on the search for a fun workout, Trisha invites her friend, Natalie, to check out the hippest new workout -- goat yoga.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: There's No Crying in Carbonara!
programme.desc: Big lumps of crabmeat are the secret to Rachael's twist on pasta carbonara. Crab, celery, lemon and sherry create a bright flavour that balances rich, creamy egg yolks, fatty pancetta and sharp cheese.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Chuck's Dinner
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's focus is on Chuck, her father-in-law, as the family helps him work cattle and she makes him dinner.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Double Care Package
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making care packages for her two daughters in college. She sends them homemade breakfast tarts, nut and seed brittle, salt and pepper crackers and cherry gummies for something sweet.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Lovin' in the Oven
programme.desc: The Kitchen is warming up for the winter with dishes from the oven that are braised, broiled, roasted, toasted and baked. Geoffrey Zakarian makes his beer braised pork pot roast with winter vegetables, and Jeff Mauro shares his roasted gnocchi and veggie.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc: Inspired by their favourite guilty-pleasure treats, Trisha Yearwood cooks a meal of indulgent foods for her friends, Glenda and Callie. The menu includes loaded Southern disco fries and the most over-the-top party burger.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Let's Be Frank
programme.desc: After completing an album of Frank Sinatra covers, Trisha Yearwood is inspired to recreate some of the crooner's favorite Italian meals with her own spin, since Ol' Blue Eyes hated garlic.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Beyond the Fringe
programme.desc: To kick off the season, Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman are going back to the 1970s as they challenge the 12 young competitors to make shag cakes. Each baker must make a cake in their chosen flavor and then decorate it to create a shag texture.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Flavor Faves

programme.title: The Vet Life: Yogi Goat
programme.desc: After treating a 'yoga' goat, Dr. Blue brings his best 'namaste' to a herd house call. Dr. Lavigne has his hands full with a trained protection dog who's not a fan of him or the cameras. A party reveals if the Blue's will be adding pink to their family.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Pardon My Frenchie
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne treats a French bulldog with a very vocal breathing problem that requires special surgery, before joining Dr. Blue on a pet pig transport. Dr. Ross has an exam with a 'pig' of his own. Gurgi the guinea pig who is coughing and sneezing.

programme.title: The Vet Life: This Little Piggy Has Mites
programme.desc: An itchy pig with a mean bite tries to take a chunk out of Dr. Blue, while Dr. Lavigne uses a unique method to fix a small dog's broken leg. Dr. Ross helps a rescue dog whose injuries may have gone untreated for too long. The docs go for gold at CyFair.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Calendar Boys
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne must decide during surgery if a giant schnauzer can keep his ear. A poodle named Jay-Z with suspicious symptoms needs Dr. Blue's help. Dr. Ross removes tumors from a rat. The vets pose with pets for a calendar to help animals in Haiti.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Lumpy Duck
programme.desc: Dr. Ross closely examines a duck with a lump in his throat. Dr. Lavigne uses x-ray film during surgery in a very unexpected way, while Dr. Blue tries to uncover a guinea pig mystery at the clinic. Dr. Lavigne's wife joins a local roller derby team.

programme.title: The Vet Life: The Dog Ate My Shorts
programme.desc: Dr. Blue must figure out what's wrong with Niko, a lethargic dog that may have eaten his mom's shorts. Dr. Lavigne operates on a husky with a torn ligament and Dr. Ross faces an emergency with his own family pet. The vets treat Cy-Fair to a crawfish boil.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Operation Dalmatian
programme.desc: Dr. Blue performs a difficult surgery on a Dalmatian being weighed down by a grapefruit-sized tumor on his head. Dr. Ross brings his family together to get a service dog for his brother Tedric, who has been suffering from seizures his whole life.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Cat vs. Robot
programme.desc: Dr. Blue quarantines a dog who may be suffering with the flu, while Dr. Ross treats a wobbly boxer whose limbs never fully formed. Dr. Lavigne thinks a robot vacuum is to blame for a stressed-out cat and performs emergency surgery to save a puppy's life.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Llama Drama
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne is tasked at removing a six-pound mass from a small dog, Dr. Blue and wife welcome their first daughter to the family. The vets make a house call to a llama that's causing some drama. Dr. Ross extracts a whopping 14 teeth from a mini poodle.

programme.desc: On Argentina's rugged Eastern coast, some of nature's most spectacular animals battle for survival.

programme.title: Wild Chile: Land Before Time
programme.desc: Rare creatures reveal secrets of South America's past in Chile's forests.

programme.desc: It's mid-summer in Maryland, but there's no time to rest for the Trackers in search of missing dogs and cats.

programme.title: Trackers: Firework Frenzy
programme.desc: As the summer heats up, the trackers and their K9 partners are working hard to bring home missing cats and dogs all across Maryland.

programme.title: Animal PD: Bad to the Bone
programme.desc: Everyone helps with an unusual rescue when the team investigates a suspected puppy mill.

programme.title: Animal PD: Hungry for Justice
programme.desc: Breezy and Jon come across dogs being starved to death and want those responsible to pay for their actions.

programme.title: Animal PD: Unchained and Dangerous
programme.desc: In Florida, animal cruelty is a felony and officers fight to defend the defenseless.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: The Roanoke colony vanished without a trace, and centuries later, it remains one of history's greatest unsolved mysteries. But new evidence might at last reveal its fate. After a man is swallowed by the earth, experts wonder if a sinkhole is to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: City of the Damned
programme.desc: A deserted town in Spain with a bloody past and a ghost fleet heading nowhere are homes to dark secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: City of the Damned

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Leaning Tower of Pisa: The New Mystery
programme.desc: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is one of the world's most iconic buildings, and it's also the site of an 800-year-old mystery; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the archaeological evidence to reveal when it might finally fall over.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures
programme.desc: The treasures of Ramses II are found at Abu Simbel, a giant temple carved into a desert cliff over 3,000 years ago, and new discoveries at this marvel reveal the secrets of ancient Egypt's greatest pharaoh.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hitler's Lost Bunker
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's underground bunker was the home of some of the greatest secrets of the Nazi's. Now, experts use cutting-edge tech to discover new evidence of Hitler's evil vision for global domination.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Wild West
programme.desc: The gunfight at Tombstone's OK Corral turned Wyatt Earp into an American folk hero, and to find what really happened here, experts use the newest tech to discover what caused the fatal shootout and what it reveals about the dark secrets of the Wild West.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Seven Wonders
programme.desc: The Seven Wonders are the engineering marvels built by great minds of long-lost civilizations, but we're not sure if some even existed. New discoveries and cutting-edge archaeological methods might prove what they looked like and why they disappeared.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Stuck
programme.desc: Two inmates suffer life-threatening stab wounds during a melee on the exercise yard that involves two rival gangs.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Amber/ Herman
programme.desc: A young mother falls in with the wrong crowd and becomes an accomplice.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Justin/ Frank
programme.desc: A struggling father resorts to illegal means to make a living, leading him into a situation involving stolen property; a doting grandfather ends up on the wrong side of the law and flees after being pulled over

programme.title: Why I Ran: Betty/ Josh
programme.desc: Police chase a woman suffering from mental illness across state lines.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Murder in Vegas
programme.desc: Civil Rights Attorney Benjamin Crump recruits a team of experts, friends and relatives to investigate the murder of Tupac Shakur.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Crips vs. Bloods
programme.desc: Benjamin Crump and his team investigate the theory that a known gang member, Orlando Anderson, is responsible for the murder of Tupac Shakur. The team looks into never before seen footage of Orlando, and examines his motive.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: East Coast vs. West Coast
programme.desc: Benjamin Crump and his team investigate the theory that the East Coast vs West Coast rap rivalry led to Tupac’s murder. A key witness provides startling information.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Devil in a Red Suit
programme.desc: The investigative team dives into the chaotic relationship between Tupac Shakur and his label head, Marion (Suge) Knight. They explore whether Tupac's departure from Death Row was motive enough for Suge to turn on their friendship.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Death Row Takeover
programme.desc: Benjamin Crump and his team of experts examine the rumored Death Row coup that may have led to Tupac's murder.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Time for Justice
programme.desc: Benjamin Crump and his team of experts analyze the authenticity of a recently revealed mystery confession letter. New evidence emerges that may break the case wide open.

programme.title: The Big House: The Lewisburg Federal

programme.title: The Big House: Parchman
programme.desc: Originally a slave plantation ruled by the whip, today Parchman's most important crop is neither food nor cotton, but prisoners.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Rookie Love
programme.desc: Rebecca is ten weeks in to her field training and makes a potentially fatal mistake. She and her boyfriend - also a rookie - must learn to deal with the realities that come with the dangerous job.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: The Shootout
programme.desc: Rookie Mark Monson doesn't like taking orders from his female boss; an overconfident marine who is now a cop responds to a 'shots fired' call.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: There's a New FTO in Town
programme.desc: Police rookie Amy is asked to put on the lights and sirens of her patrol car and race 'code' to calls. Dennis loses evidence from a drug arrest and his patrol car and his former Naval Petty Office wonders if he has what it takes.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Toy Gun
programme.desc: Rebecca Webster was the only female rookie in her Academy class. She knows that as a woman in a man's world, she's going to have to work twice as hard to prove herself. However, Rebecca's rush to do everything on her own just might backfire on her.

programme.title: Monstresses: Katie Belflower & Brandita Taliano
programme.desc: 2003, Livermore, California: 17-year old Katie Bellflower seduces a high school classmate's husband, 20-year old Mike Simons. The young Monstress is willing to kill not just once--but twice--to keep Simons to herself.

programme.title: Monstresses: Diana Haun & Morgan Hughes
programme.desc: In 1996, Ventura, California, 32 year old supermarket clerk Diana Haun thinks she has met her soul mate in co-worker Michael Dally when the two start a steamy affair. Diane decides to do whatever it takes to get rid of Michael's wife, Sherri.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Frozen Heart
programme.desc: Glenn Godfrey was Alaska's top cop, but he may not be able to protect himself and his family from an evil force unleashed by an ill-advised romance.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Murder on Camera
programme.desc: Tiana Notice is young, beautiful, brilliant and lonely. That changes when she meets James Carter online. But when James reveals a dark secret, the two find themselves drawn into an increasingly dangerous and ultimately deadly battle of wits.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: The Appointment
programme.desc: Jennifer Snyder is a shy vet tech who falls for her boss, a driven young doctor. Overshadowing their steamy affair is a controlling wife and a surprise pregnancy announcement which sets in motion a cold blooded murder plot.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Slow Burn
programme.desc: Tammy Lohr is a file clerk who is seduced by a decorated and very married cop. Things heat up when his wife receives an anonymous letter revealing the affair followed by a mysterious fire, a brutal stabbing and an elaborate plot to cover it up.

programme.title: The Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: Convenience store manager Terri Lemoine has always preferred the graveyard shift until a series of murders are committed within blocks of where she lives and works. As the body count rises, Terri grows more afraid of everyone who crosses her path.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Turn
programme.desc: A couple escapes the hazards of the big city and moves to a country community. But suspicion that their new neighbors are in the drug trade turns into bloody rage with children in caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: A Killer View
programme.desc: A young family builds their dream home in the Kentucky Hills, but their heaven is hell for the quiet couple living next door. Also, a dispute over a shared road leads to fireworks, fury, and cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Body Cam: Standoff
programme.desc: A man with an AK-47 steals a cop car taking fire at police during a 16-mile citywide chase; a home invasion call escalates into something far more terrifying.
